title: J'aahn
content:
{{Top|fca|leg}} {{Character |type=Sith Empire |image=[[File:Is_this_john.jpg]] |name=J'aahn |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Fair |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Disciples of Ragnos]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Hokk, do you read?''"
"''I read you, J'aahn.''"
"''Meet me at station Six-C.|J'aahn and Hokk|}} '''J'aahn''' {{Pronounced|ˈʤɔn}} was a fair-skinned, [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] member of the [[Disciples of Ragnos]], a [[Sith cult/Legends|cult]] attempting to revive the long-dead [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Marka Ragnos]]. He wore the uniform of his cult, a dark-[[Color/Legends|red]] jumpsuit with knee high [[Boot/Legends|boots]] and a helmet with attached [[Goggles/Legends|goggles]]. In [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]],According to ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'', the events in the game take place ten [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which according to the ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' is placed in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. J'aahn, along with other cultists such as [[Hokk]], attempted to blow up a [[Hovertrain/Legends|cargo train]] in [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]], [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. The Human [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kyle Katarn]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], the Human [[Jaden Korr]], were in Coronet [[City/Legends|City]] to [[Mission to Corellia (Disciples of Ragnos crisis)|investigate reports]] of Disciples of Ragnos activity there when they heard a distress call from the cargo train. Korr was dropped onto the train to stop it from exploding. During the skirmish that occurred, J'aahn contacted Hokk and told Hokk to meet him at station Six-C. J'aahn was then encountered by Korr and was likely killed by the Padawan.{{Fact}} ==Behind the scenes== J'aahn appears in the [[Raven Software]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'', which was first released on [[September 16]], [[2003]]. In the game, the player may decide to either [[Death/Legends|kill]] or spare him. Some dialogue identifies J'aahn as a cultist, a reference to ''Soldier of Fortune'', another game by Raven Software. Both games contain an exchange of dialogue which involves characters with the names John and Hawk, and refers to "Station 6C." (This can be confused for 6E) In ''Jedi Academy'', the spelling is changed to "J'aahn" and "Hokk."{{Fact}} ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Disciples of Ragnos members]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
